name: Truck
short_description: Survive endless hordes of zombies by driving over them and upgrading your truck with weapons. The only way out is to keep driving. Survive 30 minutes in each of the five maps, collect coins and unlock new trucks!
detailed_description:
In this survival driving game, you'll need to navigate through hordes of the undead, mowing them down with the power of your truck.

As you drive through the chaos, you'll collect experience and get weapons that give you an edge against the zombie hordes. Upgrade your weapons to become an unstoppable zombie-crushing machine.

The only way to stay alive is to keep driving. Surviving for 30 minutes unlocks the next map.

Features:
- Multiple vehicles
- Multiple weapons
- Five maps

Controls:
- WASD to drive
- Left Shift to drift
